creator: hsakamt@tsnr.com
text:
Hi,

I wrote a small tool in Ruby loading packagesite.yaml(in packagesite.txz) and got error:
Psych::SyntaxError: (<unknown>): invalid trailing UTF-8 octet at line 1 column 1

So I checked packagesite.yaml and found this error occur with german/BBBike,chinese/auto-cn-l10n and french/aster packages(probably "messages" field).

Would you please conver these messages to UTF8?

Thanks.
